query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS collective_treasury (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fundType ENUM('reinvestment_pool', 'development_fund', 'stability_reserve', 'growth_fund', 'legacy_fund', 'operating_fund') NOT NULL,
  fundName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  currentBalance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  tokenBalance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  targetBalance DECIMAL(15,2),
  minimumBalance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  allocationPercentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  lastDepositDate DATE,
  lastWithdrawalDate DATE,
  totalDeposits DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalWithdrawals DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  status ENUM('active', 'frozen', 'closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  managedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_type (fundType),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

-- Seed initial treasury funds
INSERT INTO collective_treasury (fundType, fundName, description, allocationPercentage, minimumBalance) VALUES
('reinvestment_pool', 'Community Reinvestment Pool', 'Primary pool for member business contributions', 40.00, 10000.00),
('development_fund', 'Business Development Fund', 'Funding for new business formation and growth', 25.00, 5000.00),
('stability_reserve', 'Stability Reserve', 'Emergency support fund for member businesses', 15.00, 25000.00),
('growth_fund', 'Collective Growth Fund', 'Investment in collective infrastructure and expansion', 10.00, 5000.00),
('legacy_fund', 'Legacy & Succession Fund', 'Long-term wealth preservation and generational transfer', 5.00, 10000.00),
('operating_fund', 'Operating Fund', 'Day-to-day operational expenses', 5.00, 2500.00);
